title: How do I Reset My Password? | USCIS
content:
## How do I Reset My Password?
Go to myaccount.uscis.gov and click the Forgot your Password? link.
- Go to myaccount.uscis.gov and click the Forgot your Password? link.
Enter your primary email address and click the Submit button. PLEASE NOTE: You must enter the primary email address you used to create your USCIS online account.
- Enter your primary email address and click the Submit button.
PLEASE NOTE: You must enter the primary email address you used to create your USCIS online account.
Within a few minutes, you should receive an email from MyAccount@uscis.dhs.gov with password reset instructions and a password reset link. Click on the link in the email. PLEASE NOTE: If you do not see this email in your Inbox, check your spam or junk mail folder.
- Within a few minutes, you should receive an email from MyAccount@uscis.dhs.gov with password reset instructions and a password reset link. Click on the link in the email.
PLEASE NOTE: If you do not see this email in your Inbox, check your spam or junk mail folder.
4. Enter your verification code we sent to your preferred two-step verification method. Note: If you do not have a second two-step verification method, you can set one up after you log in to your account 5. After we have confirmed your verification code, you’ll be prompted to create a new account password.
4. Enter your verification code we sent to your preferred two-step verification method.
- Note: If you do not have a second two-step verification method, you can set one up after you log in to your account
5. After we have confirmed your verification code, you’ll be prompted to create a new account password.
Enter your desired new password. Enter the same password again in the confirmation field.
- Enter your desired new password.
- Enter the same password again in the confirmation field.
Finally, use your new password to log in to your account.
- Finally, use your new password to log in to your account.
